ddt:Target.Name: USM X61/X62/x61Ph2/VS10 SWC1.6 v17
ddt:Target.Description:
USM 2010 for X61/X62/x61ph2/VS10 SWC1.6 2014/11/06
Electronic development pilot Smail KELAI tél : +33 1768 98126 smail.kelai@renault.com

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Item.Text: Storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
Storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / O adjustment fail
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Perfo
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applica

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

Data.Name: V_U_Floating_prim_CCP
Data.Comment: Consigne de tension de floating primaire

Data.Name: V_Pct_PerteSOC_Autorise_CCP
Data.Comment: Valeur de la perte de SOC autorisé

Data.Name: V_K_n_CCP
Data.Comment: Balance de prise en compte de la température ext ou moteur

Data.Name: V_U_batt_desat
Data.Comment: Consigne de tension batterie post désaturation alt

Item.Text: Maximum number of start not reached

Data.Name: V_Temp_eq_cond_CCP
Data.Comment: Temperature d'equilibre estimé pendant la phase de parking

Item.Text: Water pump activation requested by SSCU
Water pump activation not requested by SSCU

Data.Name: V_K_Activation_driver_CCP
Data.Comment: Stop&Start function activation or deactivaton requested by the customer;

Item.Text: rear defrost requested by the ECM
front wiper low speed protection active
Prompting for declutch display not requested

Data.Name: O_LIGHT_HBEAM_LH
Data.Comment: Regulation of left high beam light

Data.Name: V_B_BatteryDischargeByESM_OK_CCP
Data.Comment: Autorisation de décharge batterie en ESM

Data.Name: V_K_StopStart_state
Data.Comment: It corresponds to the state of the Stop&start function: inactive, active, unavailable nominal or not

Item.Text: Stop Start Reminder display not requested

Data.Name: E_S_RearGearFailVehiclSpeedThres_cfg
Data.Comment: C_V_RearGearFailVehiclSpeedThres=80; % [km/h] VehicleSpeed threshold to consider a rear gear fail

Data.Name: E_TM_RearGearPlausibFailureCpt_cfg
Data.Comment: C_TM_RearGearPlausibFailureCpt=2; % [s] Time out to confirm rear gear failure [0;1;10]

Item.Text: BCS protection not inhibited for manual start
BCS protection inhibited for manual start
BCS protection not inhibited for automatic start
BCS protection inhibited for automatic start

Data.Name: E_B_ABSMalfunction_Inhibition_cfg
Data.Comment: Flag to indicate if ABSMalfunction inhibite Auto Stop

Item.Text: Auto Start after stall not inhibited
No auto stop blocked reached protection

Data.Name: C_B_CorrosionInhibition
Data.Comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par corrosion

Data.Name: C_B_CyclingInhibition
Data.Comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par cyclage

Data.Name: C_B_ESMInhibitionByBeam
Data.Comment: ESM inhibited by Lights (not used in this project)

Item.Text: No activation of IHM Low battery voltage
Activation of IHM Low battery voltage

Data.Name: C_B_SSVSStartMask
Data.Comment: Flag to mask the starter delay

Item.Text: Ign OFF allowed if Vehicle speed >0
Ign OFF not allowed if Vehicle speed >0

Data.Name: C_K_NBR_BRK_1
Data.Comment: C_K_NBR_BRK_1= 3; %[-] Number of brakes before triggering pressostat in stop phase [0;1;63]

Data.Name: C_RPM_DisplayEngineStop
Data.Comment: C_RPM_DisplayEngineStop=450; % [Rpm] Engine RPM for Display Alerte Stop Auto [0;1;700]

Data.Name: C_TM_DefautBouton
Data.Comment: C_TM_DefautBouton =20; %[s] Button duration support to declar it in fault [0;1;60]

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedPeriod_limit_max
Data.Comment: detection wiping period of stress high speed

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedWipingProtection
Data.Comment: timeout of high speed wiping protection

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedPeriod_limit_max
Data.Comment: detection wiping period of stress low speed (blocking)

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedWipingProtection
Data.Comment: timeout of low speed wiping protection

Data.Name: C_TM_SSVSActivationBeforeBoost
Data.Comment: = 0.005; % [s] Time out between SSVS activation and Boost mode [0.005;0.005;0.020]

Request.Name: Start Diagnostic Session
Request.Comment: Start diagnostic session

Request.Name: Read Digital Inputs
Request.Comment: Read digital inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Analog Inputs
Request.Comment: Read analog inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Digital Outputs
Request.Comment: Read digital outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Diagnostic Inputs
Request.Comment: Read diagnostic inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read PWM Outputs
Request.Comment: Read PWM outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAdress
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM (calibrations data)

Request.Name: Read sent CAN data
Request.Comment: Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read received CAN data
Request.Comment: Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read VIN
Request.Comment: Read vehicle number identification Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Traceability
Request.Comment: Managed by supplier, must be clarify by supplier Saved if possible in ROM otherwise in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read CAN status
Request.Comment: Read CAN Status Saved following CRS document (EEPROM and RAM)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: Application DTC in EEPROM and Routine DTC in RAM

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000 / Application DTC in EEPROM

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: WriteMemoryByAdress
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM (calibrations data)

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Read Diagnosis calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: Read EEM variables
Request.Comment: Read digital outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: Read LIN status
Request.Comment: Read CAN Status Saved following CRS document (EEPROM and RAM)/ see "CRS v2.0" document for Communication Protocol and 36-02-027 --a document for Can Sleep Specification

Request.Name: DataRead.V_K_ECUFailureType_U32
Request.Comment: Read V_K_ECUFailureType_U32

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Daimler
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Control output. Temporary IO control Saved in RAM

Request.Name: OutputControl.start.O_LIGHT_HBEAM_LH
Request.Comment: Control output. Temporary IO control Saved in RAM

Request.Name: DataRead.V_B_BattDisconnect_Present_FTC
Request.Comment: Read V_B_BattDisconnect_Present_FTC

Request.Name: Write Drivers reactivation
Request.Comment: Reactivate the counter of driver protection that reached 100 cycles

Request.Name: DataRead.AT_status
Request.Comment: Read AT_status

Request.Name: DataRead.PowerSteering_status
Request.Comment: Read PowerSteering_status

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_Safety_FailureInhibition
Request.Comment: Read E_B_Safety_FailureInhibition

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_Safety_FailureInhibition
Request.Comment: Write E_B_Safety_FailureInhibition

Request.Name: DataRead.E_U_DeliveryThreshold_low
Request.Comment: Read E_U_DeliveryThreshold_low

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_U_DeliveryThreshold_low
Request.Comment: Write E_U_DeliveryThreshold_low

Request.Name: DataRead.E_U_LimitationByHSWiper
Request.Comment: Read E_U_LimitationByHSWiper

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_U_LimitationByHSWiper
Request.Comment: Write E_U_LimitationByHSWiper

Request.Comment: Read E_U_LimitationByLight

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_U_LimitationByLight
Request.Comment: Write E_U_LimitationByLight

Request.Comment: Read E_U_LimitationByLSWiper

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_U_LimitationByLSWiper
Request.Comment: Write E_U_LimitationByLSWiper

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_ConvAccelLongi_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_ConvAccelLongi

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_ConvAccelLongi_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_ConvAccelLongi

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_HSA_CONFIG_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_HSA_CONFIG

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_HSA_CONFIG_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_HSA_CONFIG

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_ManuAntiJump_Inhibition_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_SequentialStart

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_ManuAntiJump_Inhibition_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_SequentialStart

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_PumpActiveByAutoStop_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_PumpActiveByAutoStop

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_PumpActiveByAutoStop_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_PumpActiveByAutoStop

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_PumpActiveByEngine_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_PumpActiveByEngine

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_PumpActiveByEngine_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_PumpActiveByEngine

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_SelectFilter_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_SelectFilter

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_SelectFilter_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_SelectFilter

Request.Name: DataRead.E_D_DistStopAuto_min_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_D_DistStopAuto_min

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_D_DistStopAuto_min_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_D_DistStopAuto_min

Request.Name: DataRead.E_Pct_Max_slope_value_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_Pct_Max_slope_value

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_Pct_Max_slope_value_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_Pct_Max_slope_value

Request.Name: DataRead.E_Pct_Tolerance_slope_mod1_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_Pct_Tolerance_slope_mod1

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_Pct_Tolerance_slope_mod1_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_Pct_Tolerance_slope_mod1

Request.Name: DataRead.E_Pr_BrakPresStartAutoThd_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_Pr_BrakPresStartAutoThd

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_Pr_BrakPresStartAutoThd_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_Pr_BrakPresStartAutoThd

Request.Name: DataRead.E_Pr_BrakPresStopAutoThd_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_Pr_BrakPresStopAutoThd

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_Pr_BrakPresStopAutoThd_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_Pr_BrakPresStopAutoThd

Request.Name: DataRead.E_S_Threshold_speed_null_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_S_Threshold_speed_null

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_S_Threshold_speed_null_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_S_Threshold_speed_null

Request.Name: DataRead.E_TM_TauFilter_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_TM_TauFilter

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_TM_TauFilter_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_TM_TauFilter

Request.Name: DataRead.E_TM_Tempo_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_TM_Tempo

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_TM_Tempo_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_TM_Tempo

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_SafetyConfiguration1_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_SafetyConfiguration1

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_SafetyConfiguration1_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_SafetyConfiguration1

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_SafetyConfiguration2_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_SafetyConfiguration2

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_SafetyConfiguration2_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_SafetyConfiguration2

Request.Name: DataRead.E_B_SafetyConfiguration3_cfg
Request.Comment: Read E_B_SafetyConfiguration3

Request.Name: DataWrite.E_B_SafetyConfiguration3_cfg
Request.Comment: Write E_B_SafetyConfiguration3

Request.Name: DataRead.V_K_StopStartChecksum_CCP
Request.Comment: Read V_K_StopStartChecksum

Label.Text: USM start function is ASIL B with a safety driver layer
If these configurations are not coherent with USM general configurations, the starter can't be activated and DTC StopStart Failure Type 100 rise
Ask the USM team for the value of these configurations
Stop / Start - Analyse de l'état de la fonction
En Jaune = Valeurs attendues pour faire du StopStart
voir compteurs corrosion et cyclage ci-dessous
Gestion Réseau de Bord - contact = D. Blanchard
En Jaune = Valeurs attendues pour faire du StopStart
